description: Covers topics and concepts in the drug discovery process, with emphasis on laboratory assays and methods used in primary, secondary, and in vitro ADMETox (Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, Toxicity) drug screening. In addition, students build communication and critical thinking skills while working on team projects and analyzing scientific results.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the Biotechnology graduate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the Biotechnology graduate program
